data.content: Branch: fix/setup-hide-mounted-repos. Commit: 4755f0af14957dca435c566c73419e660d6a685b. Setup scan header now reports the unmounted repository count, and the regression test asserts the exact counted header while mounted repositories remain excluded from subsequent scans. Validation: bash scripts/test-setup-scan-unmounted.sh; bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
